test_results: 4/4 property tests passed. 4/4 structural tests passed. Hard dropout ablation verified.

measured_limitations.mixed_precision_complex: torch.complex32 is minimally supported; mixed precision float16 requires upcasting to float32 before calling torch.polar.

known_risks: Edge indices with zero length (no connections) require explicit short-circuiting to prevent softmax NaN cascades.
Complex-to-real aggregation discards the imaginary component; a deeper fully-complex downstream head could retain more phase capacity but risks stability.
starting_point_for_next_prompt: The complex-valued CV-PFA baseline is fully tested and integrated via ModelRegistry. We are ready to implement the real VQCPhaseGenerator for Prompt 4.
